_note: FROZEN full-path-sim baseline. Re-baseline only intentionally (delete + rerun gen).
_rebaseline_note: Re-frozen 2026-06-10 for Daniel coach-audit #3 (MAX_BIG_LOWER_LIFTS): a session may stack at most 2 BIG lower lifts (tier-1 movers on the quad/ham groups — squat/hinge/lunge/press). His live Legs day stacked 3 (Hack Squat + RDL + Walking Lunge); the cap drops the 3rd big compound and the round-robin fill replaces it with an accessory (glute/calf/core). UNGATED (it is the correct shape, not a flag toggle), so BOTH arms' selection streams legitimately shift on the leg/lower/full days. VERIFIED DETERMINISTIC (the section-A fresh-OFF-reproduces-itself test passes; two fresh runs reproduce 76d59fc4 / 912de884 — no RNG/clock leak) and SAFE: section-C is self-relative ON-vs-OFF and HOLDS — craterOn 54 <= craterOff 70, oscillation 0=0, absurd ON 36 <= OFF 35 + 10 band, convergence ON 12.4% >= OFF 12%. vs the prior freeze: craterOff 63->70 / craterOn 52->54 (oracle-gap craters reshuffle as the leg day swaps a heavy compound for an accessory — NOT the zero-tolerance F-1 class, which the §1.B-style invariant still holds at 0), meanVolumeKg drifts (1712->1648 OFF, 1507->1496 ON) with the lighter accessory replacing a heavy lower compound. Persona-matrix #70 gate stays green (26 personas); the lower day now reads 2 big lifts + accessories (Daniel's intended shape). #1 (chest-press 3-set floor on a shoulder-emphasized push day) + #2 (upper density via arm-alternation) were investigated but DEFERRED — their clean fixes need a downstream set-reducer root-cause (#1) and week-parity arm-alternation (#2), not a blunt cap that would cut real volume / break the M2 weakness-amplification invariant.
